author: @KrEyonDivinity
text:
Stage 1 of grief : shock

Stage 2 : Denial (conformity gate)

Stage 3 : Anger (We are here now)

Stage 4: Bargaining (hoping to get answers in a spin off)

Stage 5: Depression (sad because the answers given don’t fill the hole left by what was given)

Stage 6: Testing (Seeing if the answers in the spinoffs fit with what was provided in the main story, and hoping it provides closure)

Stage 7: acceptance (Realizing that Stanger things is really over and it’s not coming back and those characters are gone)
